ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rois" (
  "roi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ROI */,
  "roi_label" INTEGER /* Label assigned to the ROI */,
  "roi_name" TEXT /* Name of the ROI */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network the ROI belongs to */,
  "modality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the imaging modality used to define the ROI */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ROI */,
  "hemisphere" TEXT /* Hemisphere of the ROI (Left, Right) */,
  "anatomical_location" TEXT /* Detailed anatomical location of the ROI */,
  "functional_description" TEXT /* Functional role of the ROI */,
  "volume_mm3" REAL /* Volume of the ROI in cubic millimeters */,
  "surface_area_mm2" REAL /* Surface area of the ROI in square millimeters */,
  "centroid_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the centroid of the ROI */,
  "centroid_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the centroid of the ROI */,
  "centroid_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the centroid of the ROI */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ROI was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ROI was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the ROI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rois_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rois_modality_id FOREIGN KEY ("modality_id") REFERENCES modalities ("modality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rois_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network */,
  "hemisphere" TEXT /* Hemisphere of the network (Left, Right) */,
  "anatomical_description" TEXT /* Detailed anatomical description of the network */,
  "functional_description" TEXT /* Functional role of the network */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_networks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modalities" (
  "modality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each imaging modality */,
  "modality_name" TEXT /* Name of the imaging modality */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the imaging modality */,
  "acquisition_protocol" TEXT /* Acquisition protocol used for the modality */,
  "resolution_mm" TEXT /* Resolution of the imaging modality in millimeters */,
  "field_strength_tesla" REAL /* Field strength of the imaging modality in Tesla */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the modality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modalities_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coordinates" (
  "coord_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coordinate set */,
  "roi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ROI the coordinates belong to */,
  "r" REAL /* R-coordinate (Right-Left) */,
  "a" REAL /* A-coordinate (Anterior-Posterior) */,
  "s" REAL /* S-coordinate (Superior-Inferior) */,
  "coordinate_system" TEXT /* Coordinate system used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the coordinates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coord_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coordinates_roi_id FOREIGN KEY ("roi_id") REFERENCES rois ("roi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coordinates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis of the subject */,
  "recruitment_date" TEXT /* Date the subject was recruited for the study */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the subject */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the subject */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the subject */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the subject */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information of the subject */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of the subject's consent */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the subject entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each imaging session */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the session belongs to */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the imaging session */,
  "modality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the imaging modality used in the session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the session */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the session is part of */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protocol used for the session */,
  "scanner_model" TEXT /* Model of the scanner used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_modality_id FOREIGN KEY ("modality_id") REFERENCES modalities ("modality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roi_sessions" (
  "roi_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ROI-session relationship */,
  "roi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ROI */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imaging session */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the ROI in the session */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the ROI in the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "analysis_software" TEXT /* Software used for analysis */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the ROI-session relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roi_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roi_sessions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roi_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roi_sessions_roi_id FOREIGN KEY ("roi_id") REFERENCES rois ("roi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connectivity" (
  "connectivity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connectivity entry */,
  "roi_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first ROI */,
  "roi_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second ROI */,
  "connectivity_value" REAL /* Connectivity value between the two ROIs */,
  "modality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the imaging modality used */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imaging session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the connectivity data was created */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of connectivity analysis */,
  "analysis_software" TEXT /* Software used for connectivity analysis */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the connectivity analysis */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the connectivity data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connectivity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connectivity_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connectivity_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connectivity_roi_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("roi_id_2") REFERENCES rois ("roi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connectivity_modality_id FOREIGN KEY ("modality_id") REFERENCES modalities ("modality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connectivity_roi_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("roi_id_1") REFERENCES rois ("roi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "user_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the session */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imaging session */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the session */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's access in minutes */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user session entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding for the study */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of sessions planned for the study */,
  "total_subjects" INTEGER /* Total number of subjects planned for the study */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_sessions" (
  "study_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study-session relationship */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imaging session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session in the study (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "session_number" INTEGER /* Number of the session in the study */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the study-session relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_sessions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_sessions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_rovers" (
  "study_roi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study-ROI relationship */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "roi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ROI */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ROI in the study (e.g., included, excluded) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "roi_number" INTEGER /* Number of the ROI in the study */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the study-ROI relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_roi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_rovers_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_rovers_roi_id FOREIGN KEY ("roi_id") REFERENCES rois ("roi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_rovers_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being annotated */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., roi, session) */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was created */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., clinical, technical) */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., reviewed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
